description: This Java class 'JwtService' handles creation and validation of JSON Web Tokens (JWT) within the application's authentication system. It issues tokens for users, validates incoming tokens, and extracts user IDs from claims.

classes.name: JwtService
classes.description: A service class responsible for issuing JWT tokens and validating them for authenticated users.

methods.name: JwtService
methods.description: Constructor initializing the service, validating secret configuration, and setting up the cryptographic key.

methods.name: issueAccessToken
methods.description: Creates a signed JWT token containing user information and roles.

methods.name: parseAndValidate
methods.description: Parses and verifies the JWT token, returning its claims if valid.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Extracts the user ID from JWT claims.
